# UC-13.7.7 · Fluentd Filter Plugin Drop Rate — Records Removed by rewrite/grep

## Description

Aggressive `grep`, `record_transformer`, or sampling filters can silently discard security-relevant events after a bad regex deploy. Baseline drop_rate per filter to catch configuration mistakes.

## Value

Protects compliance-sensitive logs from accidental over-filtering.

## Implementation

If drops are not exposed, diff ingress totals pre/post filter using separate plugin metrics. Document allowed drop ceilings per filter in a lookup for static thresholds.

## SPL

```spl
index=fluent sourcetype="fluentd:plugins"
| where match(plugin_type, "^filter")
| eval dropped=coalesce(dropped_records, num_errors, filter_dropped)
| eval processed=coalesce(emit_records, emit_count, 1)
| bin _time span=15m
| stats sum(dropped) as drops, sum(processed) as proc by _time, plugin_id, host
| eval drop_rate=round(100*drops/nullif(proc,0),3)
| eventstats median(drop_rate) as baseline by plugin_id
| where drop_rate > baseline * 3 AND drop_rate > 0.1
| sort -drop_rate
```

## Visualization

Area chart (drop_rate), table (plugin × host), annotation for config deploys.

## References

- [Fluentd — Filter plugins](https://docs.fluentd.org/filter)
